title: source.context request

context_lines.description: Action-specific context_lines input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

file.description: Action-specific file input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

line.description: Action-specific line input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

path.description: Action-specific path input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

file_format.description: Action-specific file_format input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

verbose.description: Action-specific verbose input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

output.description: Export destination and rendering controls. path, file_format, and verbose are supported only where this action declares them.

symbol.description: Action-specific symbol input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

time_unit.description: Interprets only unitless time numbers; it never overrides a time string that already has a unit.

description: Read source code around a file and line.
x-how_it_works: 按 file/line 读取附近源码并尝试识别 enclosing 结构。
x-when_to_use: 把查询结果锚定到可读源码位置。

use_when: 需要按设计 symbol 或层次路径读取对应源码上下文。
do_not_use_when: 需要 driver/load 连接关系或 waveform 采样值。

alternatives.when: 需要设计 driver 关系。
需要设计 load 关系。
